case_title: 669 ELLIS C1,LP VS. WILLIAM ZIEGLER ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ZIEGLER, WILLIAM
